channel.title: NotionNext BLOG
channel.description: 这是一个由NotionNext生成的站点

item.title: MoveSpace & rootMUD 系列
item.content:encoded:
MoveSpace:
AI-powered Datahouse for on-chain data labeling & data marketplace.
rootMUD:
AI-Based Game Engine for TEXT, powered by MoveSpace.
DAO 持有 ETH 链上资产 | MoveDID（肆）
Hodl Assets by All Believers.
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/RQZA55sTi94QHwmYC6ftoA
通过 MoveDID 创建超轻量级 DAO
让 DAO 的相关操作像羽毛🪶一样轻
http://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247488005&idx=1&sn=d4d44d6aedb41421c6badcfdeeaab64f&chksm=e94ea4b3de392da5313a40f338763e2db628b644eacf65da4e14a5328d5124c6ece5f8e4be5d&scene=21#wechat_redirect
The Amazing Future of DID on Move
Next-Gen-Oriented Programming.
http://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487367&idx=1&sn=8327ae19acb3613361adfa70931edb9b&chksm=e94eb931de393027a43709da98317d399236bbcf8e4cac6242d6002997b8b6a1584d34f05152&scene=21#wechat_redirect
MUD-ETH 游戏开发极速上手之创建角色 | MUD 人文引擎设计（肆）
MUD-ETH 框架极速入门
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/3FSuPOW3qCbo0MuOzkYVDQ
基于向量数据库与LLM的Web3游戏 | MUD 人文引擎设计（叄）
是否应该存在跨游戏的公共物品？
http://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247488114&idx=1&sn=2c33109b0629f95e8a87c75a381a3a88&chksm=e94ea4c4de392dd21766ffb09eeed9f4201f0ba1b8b8d5384a6194c0da8f0040fb2ccd50298e&scene=21#wechat_redirect
【译】自治世界的例子 | 基于 Move 的 MUD 人文引擎设计（贰）
Intro about Autonomous Worlds.
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247488103&idx=1&sn=6ff2ef7d12d7ad2f3681540800cd12e0&chksm=e94ea4d1de392dc7acc5c67cc4c0016d477dbd962d5414ea5b2add37a230deb5d652d256a4fe&scene=21#wechat_redirect
从向量数据库开始 | 基于 Move 的 MUD 人文引擎设计（壹）
人文引擎超酷。
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247488099&idx=1&sn=9fdaf6f670113f1004a118a08b18fa85&chksm=e94ea4d5de392dc3c796bb724cb55f264431a7c83d71d81930c69a61305e75a61faff0663d48&scene=21#wechat_redirect

item.title: Talk about DAO 系列
item.content:encoded:
NonceGeekDAO 成长过程中的思考❤️与记录📝。
可伸缩性是DAO的核心 | Talk about DAO 0xC
下行周期中 DAO 的优势会凸显。
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/b8RfLBT-ggTn7f46YHNbZQ
心智成本与用好Github | Talk about DAO 0xB
DAO 工具的心智负担需要像羽毛一样轻
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/NnWaPozJkBzEIdXFZltuUg
DAO 是吸引开发者的新渠道 | Talk about DAO 0x0A
通过已有的开发者 DAO 来挖掘项目初期的「外部贡献者 」
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486989&idx=1&sn=f5e71b8b4ad5038dc8ff2106d29feeaf&chksm=e94eb8bbde3931adc1f1ef1be006e416d03e1b39bb7db04198fb3d875a30d5a4bf91d55ee148&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Buidl as TRPG | 聊聊DAO 0x08
DM, Player, 任务委托人与 Protector
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486876&idx=1&sn=0ee775b2a1e20716fd953b8e1e6ac172&chksm=e94ebb2ade39323cf5a16df82ebfa5a752fef731d2bfd3605c0c9ec3b51e3955fc52ef08b1b1&scene=21#wechat_redirect
「从社群到社区」与「从社区到社群」 | Talk about DAO 0x07
社群DAOs联盟 vs 多个工会组成的社区DAO
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486726&idx=1&sn=247558ef3d3ac7bf32860852710802ed&chksm=e94ebbb0de3932a6e0e52e42e9e4c7683eb786fa541052ba20ef0648e22a846b524986267d8c&scene=21#wechat_redirect
NonceGeekDAO 的演化规划 | Talk about DAO 0x06
做下规划总是有益的。
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486377&idx=1&sn=fe84913e56cc5fd2b2ee991c0d83a8a0&chksm=e94ebd1fde39340996ecbb71e8f2c8248ccafff156202b9649038e50596c7024d977c364eb49&scene=21#wechat_redirect
边际效应与杠杆 | Talk about DAO 0x05
解决「迷思」：BuidlerDAO 如何处理「外部开发任务」？
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486365&idx=1&sn=338ce3dccb0771fe17a10f6778ffb7b2&chksm=e94ebd2bde39343d5c4ae627a27168e2d81364999947bf5a34f20fca8b9490d6f9a713441aa0&scene=21#wechat_redirect
以个体成长为导向的任务投放 | Talk about DAO 0x04
将成员的个人成长作为「最重要的目标」，将「组织发展」放在其后
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486299&idx=1&sn=51549df702d61fb6408725f4a646ba34&chksm=e94ebdedde3934fb468bf3a5f2bb4fae918a6f31f7e2227a0bb96b1d77d2b5be7ad2d49513bb&scene=21#wechat_redirect
DAO 中的编程语言 | Talk about DAO 0x03
devDAO 对编程语言提出了一些要求
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486287&idx=1&sn=8218c8d5abf37ea2ee9a69207c2c630c&chksm=e94ebdf9de3934ef17ebf298bf482be89707528ce10510824f59607bb042e23ef72191755871&scene=21#wechat_redirect
即时结算是公平之源 | Talk about DAO 0x02
在 DAO 成立之初，就引入「即时结算机制」，是一种很好的增信手段
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486233&idx=1&sn=3758652e83167386eb5609d98f823b4c&chksm=e94ebdafde3934b918055e78e7bfdee9ae87746830e607d335f4deee691f2bd69a8107ff56e0&scene=21#wechat_redirect
个体与组织关于成长的 win-win 策略 | Talk about DAO 0x01
组织中个人成长和组织成长的短期一致与长期不确定
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247486225&idx=1&sn=1b9d9ed85a10ce8ea3ac85acb3ff2c02&chksm=e94ebda7de3934b1f09772737102ddfffa757be10b2a764f9a6422bd855764789931d5fea784&scene=21#wechat_redirect

item.title: Indie Hacker 成长指南系列
item.content:encoded:

item.title: 与 AI 结伴自学系列
item.description: 借助 AI 成为超级个体
item.content:encoded:
与 AI 结伴自学系列

借助 AI 成为超级个体，充分挖掘 AI 潜力🤩。
和 Aptos 白皮书对话 | 与 AI 结伴自学（肆）
第一个向量数据库的应用例子
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/_pYVOEqMWRYM9Uz4gt-GIA
向量数据库之基本概念 | 与 AI 结伴自学（三）
向量数据库是 AI 技术包中的重要一员
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487975&idx=1&sn=4d3fc6fc73879d5da0574b2cb98ccf17&chksm=e94ea751de392e47d7c0c540ee6f9f074257559a908e0495b93f6ba94116ac27c9c6e1339563&scene=21#wechat_redirect

漫长的历史长河中，人类持续增强自学能力
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487899&idx=1&sn=cd8361b40fdfad168d21738c161eaf31&chksm=e94ea72dde392e3b3c494c1b7e596e52b1cbf00afa9ca8017a920af115b8be27b1d3b284e2c4&scene=21#wechat_redirect

item.title: Move dApp 极速入门系列
item.content:encoded:
极速掌握 Move 合约开发与 Move dApp 开发。
Aptos Cheatsheets | Move dApp 极速入门（贰拾伍）
Cheatsheets for all MOVE buidlers.
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247488214&idx=1&sn=1a8c8cb4dc3c7685cb5d7b6227feec5b&chksm=e94ea460de392d7684f11be194d00eeb342de8e0437914c264650a8c1294412438d042e30d2c&mpshare=1&scene=1&srcid=1209R8vr5mHTXYelwtjGepTG&sharer_shareinfo=57f9f0ebc954f264bce78a012e41ebe9&sharer_shareinfo_first=57f9f0ebc954f264bce78a012e41ebe9#rd
Aptos 中文区全球线上黑客松！奖池 $12K+
Buidl on Aptos Together.
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247488208&idx=1&sn=dd1c519a4830024714a20b1f3bf5b4de&chksm=e94ea466de392d70636c551d9cf3f3ff5462c1cce5c9a22b8359d4d63ee7f2ec947565552561&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Aptos Token Object V2 | Move dApp 极速入门（贰拾肆）
Token V2 的源码分析及其实践
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247488088&idx=1&sn=2cc014fdac32a3b283a6326ce50336ca&chksm=e94ea4eede392df881bf8d312af54b3b84aef1684c676c34c5a81cad8f9e42c6cf3ca335c1ed&scene=21#wechat_redirect
可編程交易塊 | Move dApp 極速入門（貳拾叁）
可编程交易块提供交易的可组合性，增强了Sui Move编程模型的通用性
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487997&idx=1&sn=15c1bf6a1fef3bb6cf60fafcf3875619&chksm=e94ea74bde392e5dc8be3064afe508e874d215e443a4a5fdf08dd549a60d5d300fe576b62cad&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Aptos 密鑰輪換 | Move dApp 極速入門（貳拾貳）
密鑰輪換機制讓 Web3 賬戶更加人性化
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487965&idx=1&sn=52e2cca61a94cc8088c174f81feb585c&chksm=e94ea76bde392e7d3498d6987d039d2e6ab31eb082f5b4aa32a3e918d2220a6b9881a8280de5&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Aptos 对象模型 | Move dApp 极速入门（贰拾壹）
Aptos Object Model
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487933&idx=1&sn=9b4031be6bb9386bf05e990c1ca01ff3&chksm=e94ea70bde392e1df6143e33c9091f68120af226df982ba98bb7dac2471a5d1b80eccefcbd4c&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Aptos Moveflow SDK使用指南 | Move dApp 极速入门（贰拾）
第贰拾篇：Aptos 上的流支付基础设施
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487928&idx=1&sn=25f4b2fdd95fbaf9cb046175994d1fbc&chksm=e94ea70ede392e181d4fc82b26169a9e74aacbb905d99b5342d64f55a1c1433854146e4e9ef0&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Sui 上简单 Swap 的实现 | Move dApp 极速入门（拾玖）
实现了一个在sui公链上的 DEX模式的swap案例
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487869&idx=1&sn=0210c2760cdaa7013b254af248d3026e&chksm=e94ea7cbde392eddf65aa58465882c3e00e931e331325d39b9a27dc1d74fdbd95eff7ccf8ad0&scene=21#wechat_redirect
用 Elixir 交互 Aptos | Move dApp 极速入门（拾捌）
web3_move_ex 发布 0.4.0 版本~
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487810&idx=1&sn=355976552b3b4cef3a61aee348a12cb9&chksm=e94ea7f4de392ee2c449385d09b5d701839ac1aabe4a3fdbd6c2d141b5b5f46e4164facafaf2&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Sui 链上数据查询 | Move dApp 极速入门（拾柒）
Sui 上的两类数据抓取方式
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487743&idx=1&sn=0ca9b244952581f81acab3fe1005b23d&chksm=e94ea649de392f5f5c936696f5fa0251a84d87be865f7b71a38ec27061688f74c13e71bbd13d&scene=21#wechat_redirect
SUI 合约测试攻略 | Move dApp 极速入门（拾陆）
介绍 SUI 上测试的基本流程
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487712&idx=1&sn=afe45b007dd252898bb24749237dbde9&chksm=e94ea656de392f4029b96e4097d45f77cde49b1f8a869f9f79495aecff657f45815d5d705ab5&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Sui 数据类型详解 | Move dApp 极速入门（十五）
一文说透 Sui 的数据类型
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487689&idx=1&sn=d23f1f2e248ca0dff008525cf18880e4&chksm=e94ea67fde392f69a6e935fe90e3e1e5400d78fe57743609f1926f6db30361da0f22336be9d5&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Airdropper Contract in Aptos | Move dApp 极速入门（拾肆）
基于 Aptos 的空投工具
http://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487649&idx=1&sn=ea0b26ca4c31524b926ae4e705731a01&chksm=e94ea617de392f0166f383898a6db08bc2897b458b57fc0be76125435aa10fdf3a7d221d14ab&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Sandwich合约案例实践 | Move dApp 极速入门（拾叁）
Make a delicious sandwich by Sui.
http://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487594&idx=1&sn=13a5ca5723251a9e2c978770e7f27cfe&chksm=e94ea6dcde392fcafba3c7c135f477cbdd407b21d8576c5538f67b69ac51f0eb9bc6acf31c44&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Sui 极速上手 | Move dApp 极速入门（拾贰）
Let\x26#39;s MOVE on Sui!
http://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487563&idx=1&sn=3cfaa8159789ae81c91d97a13768ba20&chksm=e94ea6fdde392feb7bdb955e4b4ef343f128a662961fe2f921cb07ca9c764367843b14c12ea7&scene=21#wechat_redirect
Move 高阶语法 | 共学课优秀笔记
硬核长文
http://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487514&idx=1&sn=be445be4a82cbb0d27fbf283aeb5a11f&chksm=e94ea6acde392fba0d76565d2d925a8d78daed7aac2f0c1ff87919563a2a15ddda3a2a43d840&scene=21#wechat_redirect

第 0x01 周的学习总结~
http://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487327&idx=1&sn=515a260561832078f6198a00f44131e8&chksm=e94eb9e9de3930ff35790953ff06a8d69095d6cfef9177b3373fe41a837fa343ae7ebefae704&scene=21#wechat_redirect
scaffold-aptos 脚手架 | Move dApp 极速入门（拾壹）
aptos dApp 脚手架使用指南
https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzI0NTM0MzE5Mw==&mid=2247487393&idx=1&sn=6b9308171d2f691037c0ed20dcc80f68&chksm=e94eb917de3930018e4278d3e4cdd13f1c0f391c85af10eb2dd7e9805ffb8b5c28b0dec011c4&scene=21#wechat_redirect
